MessageTemplate: The property '{entityType}.{property}' is a collection or enumeration type with a value converter but with no value comparer. Set a value comparer to ensure the collection/enumeration elements are compared correctly.

Properties.commandText:
CREATE TABLE "DocumentManagement"."Users" (
    "Id" uuid NOT NULL,
    "Email" character varying(256) NOT NULL,
    "FirstName" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "LastName" character varying(100) NOT NULL,
    "PasswordHash" text NOT NULL,
    "Role" integer NOT NULL,
    "IsActive" boolean NOT NULL,
    "CreatedAt" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL,
    "CreatedBy" text,
    "UpdatedAt" timestamp with time zone,
    "UpdatedBy" text,
    CONSTRAINT "PK_Users" PRIMARY KEY ("Id")
);
